title: Error in ODBC-Driver when using Prepared Statements
poc:
create table prices (currency char(3) , 
           valid_from char(8), price decimal(15,2));
key_bug_features: Error in ODBC-Driver with Prepared Statements
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE prices (currency CHAR(3), valid_from CHAR(8), price DECIMAL(15,2), PRIMARY KEY (currency, valid_from));
INSERT INTO prices (currency, valid_from, price) VALUES ('USD', '20230101', 100.00);
INSERT INTO prices (currency, valid_from, price) VALUES ('EUR', '20230101', NULL);
SELECT * FROM prices WHERE price IS NULL;
UPDATE prices SET price = price + 10.00 WHERE currency = 'USD' AND valid_from = '20230101';
